GeneralComments:
Welcome to Sanbonani Resort, a tranquil haven situated where the Sabie River and Sand River meet. Located just minutes from the renowned Kruger National Park, our resort in Hazyview is the ultimate destination for families looking to relax, reconnect, and create unforgettable memories in Mpumalanga.

Our spacious self-catering chalets, complete with private patios and built-in braai facilities, are designed to provide comfort and convenience for every family. Whether you’re planning a weekend getaway or an extended holiday, our accommodation is perfect for families seeking a home away from home near the Kruger Park Phabeni Gate.
